name: Magic pal and great
short_description: Open world，Hang up to develop,Shoot and fight, raise pets, fly to explore the open world, and build your own island. Mechanical swarm planets are invading this world. Players and magical partners need to fight with powerful mechanical and swarm enemies to regain lost territory when they have time.
detailed_description: Open world, hang up and cultivate, shoot and fight, cultivate pets, fly and explore the open world, and build your own island. The mechanical swarm planet is invading this world. Players and magical partners need to fight against powerful mechanical and swarm enemies to shoot and fight to regain lost territory when they have time. When they don't have time, they can hang up and get rewards, so as to get a better experience when fighting the enemy.
about_the_game: Open world, hang up and cultivate, shoot and fight, cultivate pets, fly and explore the open world, and build your own island. The mechanical swarm planet is invading this world. Players and magical partners need to fight against powerful mechanical and swarm enemies to shoot and fight to regain lost territory when they have time. When they don't have time, they can hang up and get rewards, so as to get a better experience when fighting the enemy.
